info.title: Extrabat API
info.description:
The API is currently limited as follows:
  • 25 calls per second
  • 10,000 calls per 24-hour window
Calls exceeding these rates will return a 429 error. All information regarding these limits is available in the response headers.
These limits apply per user per IP address.
We also inform you that paginated responses are limited to a maximum of 100 items per call, with pagination information found in the response headers.

Finally, here are some best practices to follow whenever possible:
  • Avoid parallel calls; prefer sequential calls
  • Minimize the includes to strictly what is needed
  • When making a call based on user input, such as a search, implement a delay to avoid overloading the server with a request for each added character
  • Opt for incremental data retrieval when available rather than retrieving everything in each call
  • Reduce date ranges as much as possible, especially for data that does not change frequently, such as calendar information
  • Favor opportunistic retrieval rather than systematic retrieval, for example, synchronization systems should be avoided

post.summary: Create a customer record.
post.description:
Before sending any data to our API, you must retrieve the IDs for each of the following: civilities / questions / addresses / users / phones / contact origin / groupings / client statuses using the following routes:
  • /v1/utilisateurs (retrieve the ID of the user who will be the "followed by" for the client)
  • /v1/parametres/civilites
  • /v1/parametres/origines-contact
  • /v1/parametres/questions-complementaires (provides the labels + question IDs + and responses to map with the data from your form)
  • /v1/parametres/regroupements
  • /v1/parametres/client-statuts
  • /v1/parametres/type-adresse
  • /v1/parametres/type-telephone

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Add additional datas to the response, possible values :
  • telephone : Get an array with the customer's phones
  • adresse : Get an array with the customer's addresses
  • rdvsClient : Get all meetings for this customer
  • rdv.users : Get all users for the meetings returned by rdvsClient, ouvrage.tache.rdv, ouvrage.services.rdv, ouvrage.sav.rdv
  • regroupement : Get all groupings for this customer
  • piece : Get all parts for this customer
  • reglement : Get all payments for this customer
  • statut : Get the customer status information
  • couleur : Get the customer colors
  • origine : Get the customer origin
  • client.reponseQuestionComplementaire : Get all customer complementary question answer
  • ouvrage : Get all customer's work information
  • ouvrage.reponseQuestionComplementaire : Get customer's work complementary question answer Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage'
  • ouvrage.ouvrage_metier : Get informations on customer's jobs work Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage'
  • ouvrage.ouvrage_metier.article : Get informations on customer's jobs work's article Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.ouvrage_metier'
  • ouvrage.taches : Get customer's work task informations Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage'
  • ouvrage.taches.article : Get informations on customer's work task's articles Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.taches'
  • ouvrage.taches.rdv : Get informations on customer's work task's meetings Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.taches'
  • ouvrage.services : Get informations on customer's work services Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage'
  • ouvrage.services.article : Get informations on customer's work services's articles Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.services'
  • ouvrage.services.rdv : Get informations on customer's work services's meetings Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.services'
  • ouvrage.sav : Get informations on customer's work aftersales Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage'
  • ouvrage.sav.rdv : Get informations on customer's work aftersales meetings Must be preceded by the include 'ouvrage' and 'ouvrage.sav'
You can add as much includes as you want by separating them with a comma

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
Defines a valid condition in the form of REGEX in the request.
EX: filter=client.codeCompta~/411/ -> the filter will return all customers whose Accounting code contains 411

parameters.name: notFilter
parameters.description:
Defines an invalid condition as REGEX in the request.
EX: notFilter=client.codeCompta~/411/ -> the notfilter will exclude customers whose Accounting code contains 411

parameters.name: updated
parameters.description:
Sets a filter on a customer's modification dates.
EX :
  • updated=23-06-2021.. -> Shows customers modified between today and 23-06-2021
  • updated=23-06-2021..25-06-2021 -> Shows customers modified between 23-06-2021 and 25-06-2021
  • updated=..23-06-2021 -> Shows customers modified until 23-06-2021

parameters.name: client.createdAt
parameters.description:
Defines a filter on the creation dates of a customer.
EX: client.createdAt=23-06-2021T12:00:00..25-06-2021T15:20:00 -> Displays customers created between 23-06-2021 12:00:00 and 25-06-2021 15:20:00

parameters.name: piece
parameters.description: Id of the part we are looking for

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Add additional datas to the response, possible values :
  • fournisseur : Add all the supplier informations
  • suivi-par : Get information about users that follows the part's customer
  • lignes : Get lines informations
  • ligne.article : Get articles information by lines. Must be preceded by the include 'lignes'
  • journal : Get the sales journal informations
  • tiers_payant : Get the third-party payer informations
  • affaire : Get the related affaire informations
 You can add as much includes as you want by separating them with a comma

403.description: You don't have the required rights or you are not allowed to access this item

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: List of attributes on which to sort the response. Multiple values separated by commas are possible. Ex: piece.date:desc, piece.code

parameters.name: types
parameters.description:
Filter on specifique part type, possible values :
  • devis
  • commande
  • commande_fournisseur
  • bon_livraison
  • facture_achat
  • avoir_achat
  • facture
  • avoir
  • bon_reception
 You can add as much types as you want by separating them with a comma

parameters.name: date_debut
parameters.description: Start date, Ex : 2019-02-20

parameters.name: date_fin
parameters.description: End date, Ex : 2019-02-25

parameters.name: clients
parameters.description: Filter on specifique client, you can add as much clients as you want by separating their ids with a comma. Ex : 123456,789456

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number. Default : page = 1

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Add additional datas to the response, possible values :
  • fournisseur : Add all the supplier informations
  • client : Get customer information
  • salesforce : Get customer salesforce id. Must be preceded by the include 'client'
  • telephone : Get customer phones. Must be preceded by the include 'client'
  • adresse : Get customer addresses. Must be preceded by the include 'client'
  • regroupement : Get customer groups information. Must be preceded by the include 'client'
  • lignes : Get all lines information
  • ligne.article : Get articles information for each lines. Must be preceded by the include 'ligne'
  • suivi-par : Get information about users that follows the part's customer
  • utilisateurs-associes :
  • journal : Get accounting journal information
  • compteAssocie : Get associated journal account data. Must be preceded by the include 'journal'
  • compteEcartNegatif : Get favorable variance account data. Must be preceded by the include 'journal'
  • compteEcartPositif : Get unfavorable variance account data. Must be preceded by the include 'journal'
  • tiers_payant : Get the third-party payer informations
  • affaire : Get the related affaire informations
 You can add as much includes as you want by separating them with a comma

post.summary: Import batch of articles from CSV file.

file.description:
CSV file to import
UTF8 encoding and semicolon separator :
Header must contains this labels
- code (string)
- label (string)
- barCode (string)
- description (string)
- purchasePrice (numeric)
- purchasePrice (numeric)
- price (numeric)
- minimalPrice (numeric)
- inventoryMaintaining (boolean)
- articleDeee (numeric)
- weight (numeric)
- recommandedPrice (numeric)
- note (string)
- subCategory (string)
- category (integer) Get the id via /articles/categories route
- vatRate (integer) Get the id via /tva route
- unit (integer) Get the id via /units route
- supplierArticle (integer) Get the id via /fournisseurs route
- accountingPlan (integer) Get the id via /accounting-plan route
- purchasingAccount (integer) Get the id via /accounting-plan route

X-Pagination-Total-Pages.description: Maximum number of pages that can be viewed

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of items that can be viewed

get.summary: Returns the logged in user and their stores.

parameters.name: include
parameters.description:
Add additional datas to the response, possible values :
  • magasin.statut_sav : Retrieve the after-sales service statuses of the user's stores
  • magasin.statut_service : Retrieve the service statuses of the user's stores
  • magasin.modules : Retrieve modules from user stores
  • rights : Recover user rights
 You can add as much includes as you want by separating them with a comma

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Allows you to specify the language into which the rights will be translated (default fr).

plannedTime.description: Le temps prévu pour le rendez-vous, en centième d'heure (ex. 1h30 = 1.5)

travelTime.description: Le temps de trajet pour se rendre au lieu du rendez-vous, en minute (5 min par 5 min)

fin.description: Date de fin du rendez-vous au fromat yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm

feedback.description: le feedback du rendez vous (null || red || orange || green)

UserApiKey.description: The key found on the user's profile. This key allows you to identify the user and their rights.
UserApiKey.name: X-EXTRABAT-API-KEY

SecurityToken.description: The security key that identifies the client_id as the originator of the call. It is a SHA-256 hash of the User API Key concatenated with the client secret corresponding to the client id
SecurityToken.name: X-EXTRABAT-SECURITY
